_meta.description: Curated person-to-entity overrides and common-name overrides used when generating assets/data/people.json from bulk donor data.
_meta.methodology: Human-reviewed accepted links only. Record borderline decisions in notes/confidence here; unresolved cases belong in the generated review queue.
changelog: 2026-05-06: Round 3 platform-leadership hydration. Added 21 person seeds for current/recent CEOs and founders across the 19 V1 platforms (Zuckerberg, Pichai, Jassy, Chew, Sarandos, Khosrowshahi, Altman, Huffman, Chriss, Lores, Ek, Spiegel, Murphy, McMillon, Dario+Daniela Amodei, Ready, Silbermann, Citron, Kim, Nadella). Added 4 Walton heir entityLinks (Alice, Christy, Lukas, Sam Rawlings) for walmart. Strict matching policy: founders included only with current material stake or current board seat. Three deferred-review cases documented in CLAUDE.md Known Limitations: Thiel→PayPal (no stake/board since 2002), Kalanick→Uber (sold ~90% in 2019, off board since 2019), Gates→Microsoft (1.3% stake but majority of equity built pre-2016 scoring window, off board since 2020). Walton record dedup (rob-walton/s-robson-walton/robert-s-walton) flagged for separate cleanup pass.

2026-05-06: Added manualMergePairs for confirmed top-donor first-name variants (Ken/Kenneth, Tom/Thomas, etc.) so sync:people:bulk-top collapses durable same-person splits before hydration. This fixes duplicate FEC-fuzz hydration without adding broad heuristic identity clustering.

manualMergePairs.notes: Same Citadel founder donor split between FEC rows using Kenneth C. Griffin and Ken Griffin; same IL state and Citadel employer evidence.
Same Susquehanna donor split between Jeff Yass and Jeffrey S. Yass; same PA state and SIG employer evidence.
Same Farallon/Fahr donor split between Thomas F. Steyer and Tom Steyer; same CA state and FAHR employer evidence.
Same Lone Pine Capital founder donor split between Stephen Mandel, Steve Mandel, and Steve F. Mandel; same CT state and employer evidence.
Same donor split between Susan Mandel and Sue Mandel; same CT state and not-employed filings.
Same Ripple co-founder donor split between Christian Larsen and Chris Larsen; same CA state and Ripple employer evidence.
Same real-estate donor split between Geoffrey H. Palmer and Geoff Palmer; same CA state and matching G.H. Palmer/self-employed filings.
Same CrownQuest donor split between Timothy Dunn and Tim Dunn; same TX state and CrownQuest employer evidence.
Same Twilio founder donor split between Jeffrey Lawson and Jeff Lawson; same CA state and Twilio employer evidence.
Same Zumiez donor split between Tom Campion and Thomas Campion; same WA state and Zumiez employer evidence.
Same donor split between Timothy Disney and Tim Disney; same CA state and self-employed filings.
Same Stryker-family donor split between Pat Stryker and Patricia Stryker; same CO state and self-employed filings.
Same Beal Bank donor split across D. Andrew Beal, Andrew Beal, Daniel A. Beal, and Andy Beal; same TX state and Beal Bank employer evidence.
Same Eshelman Ventures donor split between Fredric N. Eshelman and Fred Eshelman; same NC state and employer evidence.
Same Nevada casino donor split between Phil Ruffin and Phillip Ruffin; same NV state and Ruffin/self-employed filings.
Same Carsey-Werner donor split between Marcy Carsey and Marcia Carsey; same CA state and Carsey Werner/self-employed filings.

person.notes: Former President and CEO of PayPal (September 2023 – March 2026); replaced by Enrique Lores effective March 1, 2026.

paypal.notes: CEO of PayPal from September 2023 through March 1, 2026; succeeded by Enrique Lores.

walmart.notes: Daughter of Sam Walton. Part of the Walton family ~46% control bloc held through Walton Enterprises and Walton Family Holdings Trust; ordinary Walmart performance materially affects this stake.

person.notes: President and CEO of Amazon since July 2021; previously CEO of Amazon Web Services.

amazon.notes: CEO of Amazon since July 2021, succeeding Jeff Bezos.

person.notes: Co-founder of Pinterest in 2010; stepped down as CEO in June 2022 but remains Executive Chairman with retained founder equity.

pinterest.notes: Co-founded Pinterest in 2010. Stepped down as CEO in 2022; remains Executive Chairman with retained founder equity that materially benefits from ongoing Pinterest performance.

person.notes: CEO of Match Group since May 2022; previously president of publishing at Zynga.

match-group.notes: CEO of Match Group since May 2022.

person.notes: President and CEO of Pinterest since June 2022; previously president of commerce, payments, and next billion users at Google.
Co-founder and CTO of Snap Inc. since 2011. Murphy and Evan Spiegel together hold approximately 99% of Snap's Class C supervoting shares.

snap.notes: Co-founded Snapchat in 2011. Supervoting Class C ownership (jointly with Evan Spiegel) gives controlling vote.

walmart.notes: Inherited stake on John T. Walton's death in 2005. Part of the Walton family ~46% control bloc held through Walton Enterprises and Walton Family Holdings Trust; ordinary Walmart performance materially affects this stake.

microsoft.notes: Connie Ballmer is Steve Ballmers spouse and Ballmer Group co-founder; Steve Ballmers Microsoft stake is reported as a material family wealth source.

person.notes: Co-founder and CEO of Spotify since 2006. Holds beneficiary class supervoting shares giving him controlling vote despite ~16% ordinary economic ownership.

spotify.notes: Co-founded Spotify in 2006. Supervoting beneficiary shares give him majority voting control; ordinary Spotify performance materially affects his founder stake.

person.notes: Co-founder and President of Anthropic (founded 2021 with brother Dario Amodei). Anthropic is a private company; founder stake material per public reporting.

anthropic.notes: Co-founded Anthropic in 2021. Private company; founder stake material per 2025 funding-round reporting.

person.notes: Chief Executive Officer of Uber Technologies since August 2017.

uber.notes: CEO of Uber since August 2017, succeeding Travis Kalanick.

person.notes: Co-founder and CEO of Anthropic (founded 2021 with sister Daniela Amodei and ex-OpenAI colleagues). Anthropic is a private company; founder stake is material per public reporting on the 2025 funding rounds.

anthropic.notes: Co-founded Anthropic in 2021. Private company; founder stake material per 2025 funding-round reporting.

simon-property-group.role: Former Senior Vice President & Family Shareholder

person.notes: President and CEO of Walmart since February 2014; long-tenured Walmart executive prior to that.
President and CEO of PayPal effective March 1, 2026; previously CEO of HP Inc.

paypal.notes: Appointed CEO of PayPal effective March 1, 2026, succeeding Alex Chriss.

person.notes: Co-founder and CEO of Snap Inc. since 2011. Spiegel and Bobby Murphy together hold approximately 99% of Snap's Class C supervoting shares (10 votes each), giving them joint controlling vote.

snap.notes: Co-founded Snapchat in 2011. Supervoting Class C ownership (jointly with Bobby Murphy) gives controlling vote.

person.notes: Manual add for Grindr TestFlight feedback #134. Current CEO verified from Grindr investor relations; FEC filings appear under George Arison and prior legal/name variant Irakli/Irakly Areshidze.

grindr.notes: Grindr investor relations lists Arison as CEO since October 2022.

person.notes: Reviewed for KKR link. Person exists in bulk-ranked donors, but no live KKR entity exists in the current graph; do not link through portfolio companies by generalized association.

disney.notes: Disney stated in December 2023 that Perlmutter owned more than 25 million Disney shares through Trian's proxy fight and described him as a former Disney executive.

fox-corporation.notes: Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James Murdoch and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares and receive cash consideration.

news-corp.notes: Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James Murdoch and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares and receive cash consideration.

renaissance-technologies.notes: Jim Simons founded Renaissance Technologies in 1982; mark historical after his 2024 death.

person.notes: Co-founder and CEO of Discord since 2015. Discord is a private company; founder stake material per public reporting on its valuation rounds.

discord.notes: Co-founded Discord in 2015. Private company; founder stake material.

pritzker-group.notes: Official Pritzker Group materials describe J.B. Pritzker as Pritzker Group managing partner and say the firm has operated since 1996.

person.notes: Manual add for Grindr founder request. Grindr's 2018 acquisition release identifies Simkhai as founder/CEO and says he exited after Kunlun purchased the remaining stake.

grindr.notes: Grindr's 2018 acquisition release says Kunlun bought the remaining stake from founder Joel Simkhai and that Simkhai exited the company.

jw-childs-associates.notes: The official J.W. Childs Associates team page says John W. Childs is Chairman of the firm he founded in 1995.

stryker.notes: Jon Stryker is a billionaire heir to the Stryker Corporation fortune; the family wealth is tied to the medical technology company founded by Homer Stryker.

fox-corporation.role: Chairman Emeritus / Former Controlling Family Trust Figure
fox-corporation.notes: Rupert Murdoch is Chairman Emeritus; September 2025 trust resolution shifted voting control over FOX/News Corp trust-held shares solely to Lachlan, so Rupert is retained as a historical family-control link.

news-corp.role: Chairman Emeritus / Former Controlling Family Trust Figure
news-corp.notes: Rupert Murdoch is Chairman Emeritus; September 2025 trust resolution shifted voting control over FOX/News Corp trust-held shares solely to Lachlan, so Rupert is retained as a historical family-control link.

fox-corporation.role: Former Murdoch Family Trust Beneficiary Household
fox-corporation.notes: Kathryn Murdoch is married to James Murdoch. Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares, so this is historical, not a current control link.

news-corp.role: Former Murdoch Family Trust Beneficiary Household
news-corp.notes: Kathryn Murdoch is married to James Murdoch. Fox/News Corp announced in September 2025 that James and other departing beneficiaries would cease to be beneficiaries of trusts holding FOX or News Corp shares, so this is historical, not a current control link.

person.notes: Manual add for entity linkage: Fox identifies Lachlan Murdoch as Executive Chair and CEO; News Corp identifies him as Chair. September 2025 Fox/News Corp releases state voting control over trust-held shares rests solely with Lachlan through LGC Holdco.

fox-corporation.role: Executive Chair, CEO & Controlling Family Trust Manager
fox-corporation.notes: Fox 2026 investor release identifies Lachlan as Executive Chair and CEO; 2025 trust-resolution release says voting control of FOX and News Corp shares owned by LGC Holdco rests solely with Lachlan.

news-corp.notes: News Corp board page identifies Lachlan as Chair; 2025 trust-resolution release says voting control of News Corp and FOX shares owned by LGC Holdco rests solely with Lachlan.

person.notes: Manual add for entity linkage: Alphabet 2025 proxy reports Larry Page beneficially owns 389,051,160 Class B shares, 45.5% of Class B and 27.1% total voting power.

google-alphabet.notes: Alphabet 2025 proxy reports Page holds 45.5% of Class B shares and 27.1% total voting power; ordinary Google/Alphabet revenue can affect the value of his founder stake.

person.notes: Manual add for review completeness. No accepted entity link: Omega Advisors is not in the live graph and, as a private investment office, does not pass the ordinary consumer-spending economic-benefit test for this app surface.
Reviewed for WWE/TKO link. No live WWE/TKO entity exists in the current V1 graph, so no accepted link was added in this pass.

walmart.notes: Inherited from John T. Walton on his 2005 death. Part of the Walton family ~46% control bloc held through Walton Enterprises and Walton Family Holdings Trust; ordinary Walmart performance materially affects this stake.

renaissance-technologies.notes: Marilyn Simons was James Simons spouse; Jim Simons founded Renaissance Technologies and remained tied to the firm until his 2024 death. Mark historical after 2024.

person.notes: Founder, Chairman, and CEO of Meta Platforms (formerly Facebook); holds approximately 13.6% of Class A and ~99% of Class B supervoting shares per Meta's 2025 proxy, giving him controlling vote.

meta.notes: Founder of Facebook (2004); Class B supervoting majority gives him controlling vote at Meta. Ongoing Meta performance materially affects his founder stake.

td-ameritrade.notes: Joe Ricketts founded Ameritrade/TD Ameritrade and Forbes reported the Ricketts family owned just under 12% before the Charles Schwab acquisition; mark historical because Schwab acquired TD Ameritrade in 2020 and the platform shut down in 2024.

stryker.notes: Pat Stryker is a billionaire heir to the Stryker Corporation fortune; Forbes identifies her grandfather as Stryker Corp founder Homer Stryker.

netflix.notes: Patricia Quillin is Reed Hastings spouse; Hastings co-founded Netflix, remained executive chair into 2026, and retains shareholder exposure even as he steps down from the board in June 2026.

person.notes: Manual add for Ricketts family audit; linked historically to TD Ameritrade family wealth, not treated as a current operating role after Schwab acquisition.

td-ameritrade.notes: Forbes reported the Ricketts family owned just under 12% of TD Ameritrade; mark historical because Schwab acquired TD Ameritrade in 2020 and the platform shut down in 2024.

netflix.notes: Hastings co-founded Netflix and remains executive chair until the June 2026 annual meeting; mark current for this April 2026 pass and review after the board transition.

bigelow-aerospace.notes: Bigelow Aerospace's official 'Who We Are' page identifies Robert T. Bigelow as the company's founder and president and dates the founding to 1999.

walmart.notes: Grandson of Sam Walton, son of Jim C. Walton. Part of the Walton family ~46% control bloc held through Walton Enterprises and Walton Family Holdings Trust; ordinary Walmart performance materially affects this stake.
